scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @curvvtech/api" "npm run dev -w @curvvtech/website" "npm run dev -w @curvvtech/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @curvvtech/api && npm run build -w @curvvtech/website && npm run build -w @curvvtech/admin && npm run build -w @curvvtech/followup-web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @curvvtech/website --if-present && npm run lint -w @curvvtech/api --if-present
